name: Rizogalo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, pour the cold milk and add the rice, sugar, and butter.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently until thickened, approximately 1 hour. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, add the cinnamon stick and cloves if desired.
3. Remove from the heat, stir in vanilla extract, then remove the cinnamon stick and cloves.
4. Beat the eggs lightly in a small bowl. Add one tablespoon of the hot pudding mixture to the eggs, stirring gently. Repeat this process twice more.
5. Add the egg mixture to the pudding, stirring until well combined.
6. Pour into individual serving dishes or a large serving bowl. Sprinkle with ground cinnamon and let cool before refrigerating. Serve chilled.
Note: A vanilla bean can be used instead of cinnamon stick and cloves, or grated lemon rind can replace all the other flavorings.
